mapper.insert: insert into wf_historic_task (id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, state, operator, start_time, end_time, parent_task_id, variable) values(#{id}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{instanceId}, #{taskDefinitionId}, #{displayName}, #{taskType}, #{performType}, #{state}, #{operator}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{parentTaskId}, #{variable})
mapper.select: select id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, state, operator, start_time, end_time, parent_task_id, variable from wf_historic_task where id = #{id}

select id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, state, operator, start_time, end_time, parent_task_id, variable from wf_historic_task where instance_id = #{instanceId}
